ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rods" (
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each rod */,
  "ultimate_strength_rating" INTEGER /* Ultimate strength rating of the rod in lbs force (N) */,
  "rod_diameter_inches" REAL /* Diameter of the rod in inches (cm) */,
  "rod_length_feet" REAL /* Length of the rod in feet (m) */,
  "weight_lbs" REAL /* Weight of the rod in lbs (kg) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the rod */,
  "coating" TEXT /* Coating applied to the rod */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the rod was manufactured */,
  "quality_certificate" TEXT /* Reference to the quality certificate of the rod */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Special usage instructions or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catalog_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Reference to the rod's catalog number */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the rod in stock */,
  "last_stock_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Storage location of the rods */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for triggering a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the last reorder was placed */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the rods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_catalog_number FOREIGN KEY ("catalog_number") REFERENCES rods ("catalog_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Reference to the rod's catalog number */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of rods sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the rod sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the rods were shipped */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_catalog_number FOREIGN KEY ("catalog_number") REFERENCES rods ("catalog_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the supplier belongs to */,
  "supply_type" TEXT /* Type of supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales representative operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
